message:
feat(pt-core): add conformal prediction module

Implements conformal prediction for distribution-free robust intervals:
- ConformalRegressor: split conformal with absolute residual scores
- ConformalClassifier: nonconformity scores with p-values
- BlockedConformalRegressor: for time series with temporal dependence
- AdaptiveConformalRegressor: with coverage tracking and α adaptation
- ConformalEvidence: for decision-core integration

20 tests covering regression/classification variants, blocked and
adaptive modes.

Closes process_triage-tcf

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
